text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan manages to leave quite a mark on
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we've successfully navigated the crucial
first three years of her career.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while we bask in the greatness of our
victories...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
And that concludes the announcement of this
year's star Umamusume. Next...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
This year, at the request of Tracen Academy's
director, we have added an extra award for a
particular Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
One who has left a huge mark on the racing
world...

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Curren Chan! Please come up to the podium!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Coming! ♪

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations! Curren Chan, you've thrilled the
racing world—not only with your races but also
with your extraordinary social media presence!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
For this, it's my honor to present you with the new
CC Award!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: CC Award? Is that...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Clarification! The official name is the "Crown of
Cuteness Award"!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: A-a crown of cuteness?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I'm so... happy. Thank you so much! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I did it, Big Bro!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I did it, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
"Big Bro"? Do you have family with you here
tonight?

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
"Big Sis"? Do you have family with you here
tonight?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well... They're more like a friend who I love like
family. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that heart-pounding statement, Curren
Chan becomes the most beloved runner in both
name and reality!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A bit later...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Just one more question, please. Today, you
received a special award.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Where exactly do you want to go from here?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I've already decided, of course. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Having received this award today, I think that my
work here might just be finished. So next...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I wanna run internationally!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
There are so many people who haven't been lucky
enough to meet Cute Curren Chan yet.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So I'm gonna run a special delivery of cuteness to
them, wherever they may be! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's time to expand my circle of cuteness. ♪ I'm
coming for you, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the interview airs, "Curren" starts trending
worldwide. Then...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro! I finished checking in!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! I finished checking in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I realize it, we're at the airport ready to
set off!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Are you still half asleep? C'mon! Stay with me
here!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Today's a brand new day on my path to cuteness.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
After "cute" is "super cute." And after that is
"super-duper cute"...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
My dream's endless, and I'm gonna chase it
forever. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You know... I'm totally convinced I can do it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
As long as I'm with you... I can spread my cuteness
throughout the whole wide world.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
As long as I'm with you... I can spread my cuteness
throughout the whole wide world.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aaaand!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I bet I could even take on the universe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I bet I could even take on the universe!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So don't you take your eyes off of me, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: So don't you take your eyes off of me, okay? ♪
